metadata.description: 2025 Field Strength Gap analysis and year-adaptive parameters

field_strength_gap.interpretation: gap_ratio > 1.0 indicates 1-seeds are more dominant than historical average. Upset probabilities for top-seed matchups should be reduced by factor of 1/1.279 = 0.782

futures_concentration_index.note: Must be verified by betting-agent with actual 2025 futures data

seed_matchup_base_rates.description: Historical upset rates by seed matchup (1985-2024, ~40 years)

adjusted_upset_rates_2025.description: Base rates adjusted by gap_ratio for top-seed matchups only
adjusted_upset_rates_2025.note: 5v12 through 8v9 are NOT adjusted — structural parity persists regardless of year
